 *   this.a = 1;
 *   this.b = 2;
 * }
 *
 * Foo.prototype.c = 3;
 *
 * _.keys(new Foo);
 * // => ['a', 'b'] (iteration order is not guaranteed)
 *
 * _.keys('hi');
 * // => ['0', '1']
 */
function keys(object) {
  return isArrayLike(object) ? arrayLikeKeys(object) : baseKeys(object);
}

module.exports = keys;
